parts.label: Thermal Path / Radiator Strap Evidence
parts.spec: Thermal_path closure module: radiator_face, thermal_strap_note, vent_hole, battery-to-frame conduction pad, service-visible thermal datum, inspection label, mass budget <120g

parts.spec: Integration_harness closure spine with harness_channel, connector_keying, assembly_datum pads, routing clips, service hatch, reciprocal interface labels, inspection checklist marks

requirements: Provide a robust 3U CubeSat frame with deployable rail guides and PC/104 standoffs.
Ensure structural integrity under launch and operational loads.
Facilitate easy access for maintenance and upgrades.

args.text: Checklist: 1. Harness Integrity 2. Connector Fit 3. Datum Alignment

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to mixed materials.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests on the prototype.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient stiffness in rail guides.
risk.mit: Perform finite element analysis to validate stiffness.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate clearance for moving parts.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearances based on tolerance stack-up analysis.

risk.desc: Risk of over-design leading to unnecessary weight.
risk.mit: Optimize the design for minimal weight while maintaining strength.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly.
risk.mit: Implement alignment features and ensure proper assembly instructions.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: 3U CubeSat primary frame, Al 7075, PC/104 standoffs, deployable rail guide grooves (CDS spec)
physics_paths: Load Path: Structural loads from solar panels and antennas transferred through corner posts to frame.
Flow Path: Electrical signals from onboard electronics routed through PCB traces.
Thermal Path: Heat dissipation from electronic components to outer surfaces via conduction.
Motion Path: Rail guides allow deployment/retraction of solar panels.
Pressure Path: No significant pressure differentials expected within the structure.
Human/Service Access Path: Removable panels provide access for maintenance and upgrades.
integration_opportunities: Integration of deployable solar panel mechanism.
verification_focus: Ease of maintenance and upgrade access.
